title: Adam's Repentance
summary: The Quranic repentance plea spoken after the slip of Adam and his wife, shaped by confession, forgiveness, and hope.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخَـٰسِرِينَ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakunanna min al-khasirin.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves. If You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we will surely be among the losers.
